clusters.title: UK investigating reports Russian warship fired warning shots near yacht in English Channel
clusters.neutral_headline: Russian frigate fires warning shots at British yacht in Channel
bullet_summary: Russia said one of its warships fired warning shots Tuesday at a yacht making a "dangerous approach" in the Channel, as the UK said it was investigating the incident
The British military said it is investigating after a Russian warship fired warning shots at a UK-registered yacht in the English Channel on Tuesday, about 30 kilometres south of the Isle of Wight
Russia said one of its warships fired warning shots after it made a "dangerous approach"

items.title: UK investigating reports Russian warship fired warning shots near yacht in English Channel
items.standfirst: A British retired couple who were onboard the yacht tell BBC Newsnight they tried to show the warship they had changed course before the shots were fired.
items.content: A British retired couple who were onboard the yacht tell BBC Newsnight they tried to show the warship they had changed course before the shots were fired.

items.title: Russian frigate fires warning shots at British yacht in Channel
items.standfirst: Shots fired within 500 metres of vessel near Isle of Wight amid heightened tensions between London and MoscowA Russian warship fired warning shots within a few hundred metres of a British pleasure yacht sailing across the Channel on Tuesday morning amid a period of heightened tensions between London and Moscow.The rare incident took place at 11.40am more than 20 miles south of the Isle of Wight and less than 40 miles north of Normandy, France, when the yacht, identified as the private vessel Bright Future, sailed close to the Admiral Grigorovich and ignored at least one warning. Continue reading...
items.content: Shots fired within 500 metres of vessel near Isle of Wight amid heightened tensions between London and MoscowA Russian warship fired warning shots within a few hundred metres of a British pleasure yacht sailing across the Channel on Tuesday morning amid a period of heightened tensions between London and Moscow.The rare incident took place at 11.40am more than 20 miles south of the Isle of Wight and less than 40 miles north of Normandy, France, when the yacht, identified as the private vessel Bright Future, sailed close to the Admiral Grigorovich and ignored at least one warning. Continue reading...

items.title: Russian warship fires 'warning shots' at UK yacht in Channel
items.standfirst: Russia said one of its warships fired warning shots Tuesday at a yacht making a "dangerous approach" in the Channel, as the UK said it was investigating the incident. It involved the frigate Admiral Grigorovich and a UK-registered yacht around 20 nautical miles south of the Isle of Wight just outside British waters. FRANCE 24's Bénédicte Paviot reports from London.
items.content: Russia said one of its warships fired warning shots Tuesday at a yacht making a "dangerous approach" in the Channel, as the UK said it was investigating the incident. It involved the frigate Admiral Grigorovich and a UK-registered yacht around 20 nautical miles south of the Isle of Wight just outside British waters. FRANCE 24's Bénédicte Paviot reports from London.

items.title: Russian warship fires warning shots towards yacht in English Channel
items.standfirst: UK says incident is not linked to Britain’s interception of an oil tanker that is part of Moscow’s shadow fleet
items.content: UK says incident is not linked to Britain’s interception of an oil tanker that is part of Moscow’s shadow fleet

items.title: Russian warship fires warning shots at UK-flagged yacht in the English Channel
items.standfirst: The British military said it is investigating after a Russian warship fired warning shots at a UK-registered yacht in the English Channel on Tuesday, about 30 kilometres south of the Isle of Wight. Russia said one of its warships fired warning shots after it made a "dangerous approach".
items.content: The British military said it is investigating after a Russian warship fired warning shots at a UK-registered yacht in the English Channel on Tuesday, about 30 kilometres south of the Isle of Wight. Russia said one of its warships fired warning shots after it made a "dangerous approach".

items.title: What we know about Russian warship that fired warning shots in English Channel
items.standfirst: A Russia warship fired warning shots at a UK-registered yacht in the English Channel in an incident that has intensified national security concerns.
items.content: A Russia warship fired warning shots at a UK-registered yacht in the English Channel in an incident that has intensified national security concerns.

items.standfirst: Elon Musk’s AI, rocket and satellite group also announces $60bn deal for AI coding app Cursor
items.content: Elon Musk’s AI, rocket and satellite group also announces $60bn deal for AI coding app Cursor

items.title: SpaceX overtakes Amazon as world’s fifth biggest company
items.standfirst: Value of Elon Musk’s firm at one point rose to $2.97tn just days after its IPO following purchase of AI coding startup CursorElon Musk’s SpaceX has overtaken Amazon as the world’s fifth-most valuable company days after its stock market debut.The jump in value came as it agreed to buy the startup behind the AI-powered coding app Cursor for $60bn (£44bn), in an attempt to capitalise on the technology’s success as a coding tool. Continue reading...
items.content: Value of Elon Musk’s firm at one point rose to $2.97tn just days after its IPO following purchase of AI coding startup CursorElon Musk’s SpaceX has overtaken Amazon as the world’s fifth-most valuable company days after its stock market debut.The jump in value came as it agreed to buy the startup behind the AI-powered coding app Cursor for $60bn (£44bn), in an attempt to capitalise on the technology’s success as a coding tool. Continue reading...

items.title: Musk's SpaceX overtakes Amazon to become world's fifth most valuable firm
items.standfirst: Elon Musk's rocket firm has overtaken the retail and media empire in value after a surge in its share price.
items.content: Elon Musk's rocket firm has overtaken the retail and media empire in value after a surge in its share price.

items.title: SpaceX Overtakes Amazon in Value as Post-IPO Rally Reaches 49%
items.standfirst: SpaceX jumped for a third straight day on Tuesday, overtaking Amazon.com Inc. in value to become the fifth-largest stock in the world.
items.content: SpaceX jumped for a third straight day on Tuesday, overtaking Amazon.com Inc. in value to become the fifth-largest stock in the world.

items.content: An artist critical of Russia's President Vladimir Putin was shot and killed near his home in eastern Poland on Monday.

clusters.title: Feds reveal new details of alleged plot to attack White House UFC event
clusters.neutral_headline: Group planned to attack White House UFC event using snipers and drones, FBI says
bullet_summary: The FBI said it disrupted an attempt to attack Sunday's UFC America 250 event at the White House, with court records detailing an alleged plot to use small drones carrying explosives
The FBI on Tuesday said it thwarted an attempt to attack Sunday's UFC America 250 event at the White House

items.title: Feds reveal new details of alleged plot to attack White House UFC event

items.title: Group planned to attack White House UFC event using snipers and drones, FBI says
items.standfirst: In newly unsealed court filings, the government says the group allegedly expressed grievances about corruption, the Epstein files, and data centres.
items.content: In newly unsealed court filings, the government says the group allegedly expressed grievances about corruption, the Epstein files, and data centres.

items.title: These were the plans for the alleged White House-UFC attack, according to an affidavit
items.standfirst: The FBI on Tuesday said it thwarted an attempt to attack Sunday's UFC America 250 event at the White House. Court records show what the alleged plot entailed. CBS News' Jake Rosen has those details and former NYPD Deputy Commissioner Richard Esposito joins with analysis.
items.content: The FBI on Tuesday said it thwarted an attempt to attack Sunday's UFC America 250 event at the White House. Court records show what the alleged plot entailed. CBS News' Jake Rosen has those details and former NYPD Deputy Commissioner Richard Esposito joins with analysis.

items.standfirst: The sale will split ownership of the pizza chain between a U.S.-based private equity firm and a Chinese restaurant company.
items.content: The sale will split ownership of the pizza chain between a U.S.-based private equity firm and a Chinese restaurant company.

items.title: Struggling Pizza Hut restaurant chain to be sold in two deals worth $2.7bn
items.standfirst: Yum! Brands, parent company of KFC and Taco Bell, to sell Pizza Hut as it faces dated stores and growing competitionThe struggling Pizza Hut restaurant chain will be sold for $2.7bn by parent company Yum! Brands.Yum! Brands said in February that it was considering selling Pizza Hut and the chain looked to close 250 US restaurants. The pizza chain has struggled with outdated stores and growing competition. Continue reading...

Brands, parent company of KFC and Taco Bell, to sell Pizza Hut as it faces dated stores and growing competitionThe struggling Pizza Hut restaurant chain will be sold for $2.7bn by parent company Yum! clusters.title: Paramount rejected ad criticizing its owners and Warner Bros acquisition
clusters.neutral_headline: Paramount rejected ad criticizing its owners and Warner Bros acquisition
bullet_summary: The commercial was submitted by the Freedom of the Press Foundation to run during Donald Trump’s UFC event

items.title: Paramount rejected ad criticizing its owners and Warner Bros acquisition
items.standfirst: Rejected citing ‘conflict of interest’, the ad took aim at Trump allies David Ellison, Paramount Skydance chief, and his billionaire father, Larry EllisonParamount Skydance refused to air an ad submitted by a press freedom group that heavily criticized the network’s leadership and merger with Warner Bros Discovery, with an advertising associate deeming it a “conflict of interest”.The Freedom of the Press Foundation had hoped to air the 30-second ad during Sunday’s Ultimate Fighting Championship broadcast at the White House, which aired on the streaming service Paramount+ – though a client partner for Paramount told the organization’s ad-buyer that such placement was not guaranteed. Continue reading...
items.content: Rejected citing ‘conflict of interest’, the ad took aim at Trump allies David Ellison, Paramount Skydance chief, and his billionaire father, Larry EllisonParamount Skydance refused to air an ad submitted by a press freedom group that heavily criticized the network’s leadership and merger with Warner Bros Discovery, with an advertising associate deeming it a “conflict of interest”.The Freedom of the Press Foundation had hoped to air the 30-second ad during Sunday’s Ultimate Fighting Championship broadcast at the White House, which aired on the streaming service Paramount+ – though a client partner for Paramount told the organization’s ad-buyer that such placement was not guaranteed. Continue reading...

items.title: Paramount Refused to Air an Ad Criticizing Its Merger With Warner Bros.
items.standfirst: The commercial was submitted by the Freedom of the Press Foundation to run during Donald Trump’s UFC event. It criticized the $111 billion merger as a threat to the First Amendment.
items.content: The commercial was submitted by the Freedom of the Press Foundation to run during Donald Trump’s UFC event. It criticized the $111 billion merger as a threat to the First Amendment.
